1.description: Triage step 3: derive impact, urgency, and priority for an open incident or request via the Motadata 4x4 matrix, inferring impact/urgency from ticket and SLA signals (LLM-assisted) when not explicit. Accepts the suggested category/subcategory from check_duplicate_candidates (data-flow bound). Read-only — recommends, never writes.

parameters.description: Service module of the ticket: incident | request.
parameters.name: service_id

parameters.description: Canonical work-record id being triaged (e.g. INC0001001).
parameters.name: ticket_id

parameters.description: Optional suggested category (data-flow bound from check_duplicate_candidates).
parameters.name: suggested_category

parameters.description: Optional suggested subcategory (incident only; data-flow bound from check_duplicate_candidates).
parameters.name: suggested_subcategory
